name: ollama-nvidia.dnp.dappnode.eth
description:
Run large language models locally on your DAppNode with GPU acceleration. Ollama with NVIDIA GPU support for GPU inference.

**Features:**
- NVIDIA GPU acceleration
- Complete privacy - all processing stays local
- Support for multiple LLM models (Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.)

**Requirements:**
- NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support
- At least 8GB RAM (16GB+ recommended)
- Sufficient storage for models (10GB+ recommended)
